source.name: Playwright Best Practices
source.license_notes: Summarized guidance with source link; do not copy full docs.

goal: Handle overlays, modals, dropdowns, popups, and iframes without brittle clicks.
steps: Check for visible dialogs/overlays before clicking underlying controls.
Close or interact with modal using role/name locators.
Use page.waitForEvent('popup') when a new tab/window is expected.
Wait for dropdown listbox/menu option visibility before selecting.
safety_notes: Do not dismiss security/permission/payment dialogs unless user explicitly authorizes it.

quality.notes: Synthesized from Playwright locator/popup/frame practices and common automation failures.

retrieval.ai_summary: For overlays/modals/dropdowns/iframes, detect the blocking surface, interact by role, use frameLocator or popup waits, then verify target state by screenshot/assertion.
